message:
feat(fuzz): add fuzz_btrfs_tree_items target

fuzz/fuzz_targets/fuzz_btrfs_tree_items.rs (new)
  * Structure-aware cargo-fuzz target covering the btrfs item-payload
    decoders: parse_root_item, parse_root_ref, parse_inode_item,
    parse_dir_items, parse_extent_data. These five parsers cover the
    "btrfs item payload decode" parity row in FEATURE_PARITY.md
    (ROOT_ITEM / ROOT_REF / INODE_ITEM / DIR_ITEM / EXTENT_DATA).
  * Reuses the BTRFS_FILE_EXTENT_{INLINE,REG,PREALLOC} type constants
    to steer extent-data inputs through all three encoding shapes.
  * Small read_u16/u32/u64/array_16 helpers at the top pull bytes
    from the arbitrary input buffer with bounds checks, matching the
    pattern used by the other btrfs fuzz targets.
  * No arbitrary::Arbitrary derive — the target hand-parses a tagged
    union from the fuzz buffer so libfuzzer can mutate the tag
    discriminant directly.

fuzz/Cargo.toml
  * Register `[[bin]] fuzz_btrfs_tree_items` pointing at the new
    fuzz_targets file. Brings total fuzz target count to 10.

fuzz/corpus/fuzz_btrfs_tree_items/ (new)
  * Starter corpus committed so the target starts with coverage
    from iteration one:
      - seed_byte       (1 B)  — single-byte trivial seed
      - seed_empty      (0 B)  — empty input
      - seed_root_ref.bin (20 B) — minimal valid BtrfsRootRef
        payload for parse_root_ref coverage

Paired with the FEATURE_PARITY.md annotation in the previous commit
("btrfs item payload decode" row now lists fuzz_btrfs_tree_items as
covering deterministic decode and field-level payload invariants).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -117,3 +117,8 @@ doc = false
 name = "fuzz_btrfs_tree_log"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_btrfs_tree_log.rs"
 doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_btrfs_tree_items"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_btrfs_tree_items.rs"
+doc = false
